g.text: Pack 6 · Symbiosis — the boundary in time
Each pack descends in layers: closing image → pattern → buildable tools → named instruments → diagnostics → one headline measure

text.tspan: Pack 6 keeps each pack from its negation —
and guards itself: symbiosis without service

g.text: bridging map hands over the terrain
portability + exit clauses in every contract
treaties, IDs, portability make symbiosis feasible
retired systems gift maps, evals, records
